signatures.label: Table.SelectRows(table as table, condition as function) as table

documentation.value: Returns a table containing only the rows that match the specified condition function.
The input table to filter.
A function applied to each row. Returns true to include the row (e.g., each [Column] > 10).

signatures.label: Table.AddColumn(table as table, newColumnName as text, columnGenerator as function, optional columnType as type) as table

documentation.value: Adds a new column to the table with values computed by the given function.
The input table.
The name of the new column.
A function applied to each row to compute the new column value (e.g., each [A] + [B]).
Optional. The type of the new column (e.g., type number, type text).

signatures.label: Table.TransformColumns(table as table, transformOperations as list, optional defaultTransformation as function, optional missingField as MissingField.Type) as table

documentation.value: Transforms the values of one or more columns using the specified transformation functions.
The input table.
A list of {column name, transformation function} pairs.
Optional. A function to apply to columns not listed in transformOperations.
Optional. Behavior when a column is missing: MissingField.Error, MissingField.Ignore, MissingField.UseNull.

signatures.label: List.Select(list as list, selection as function) as list

documentation.value: Returns a list of values from the input list that match the selection criteria.
The input list to filter.
The condition function applied to each element (e.g., each _ > 5).

signatures.label: Text.Contains(text as nullable text, substring as text, optional comparer as Comparer.Type) as nullable logical

documentation.value: Returns true if the text contains the specified substring.
The text to search in.
The substring to search for.
Optional. A comparer function (e.g., Comparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase for case-insensitive).

signatures.label: Number.Round(number as nullable number, optional digits as nullable number, optional roundingMode as nullable RoundingMode.Type) as nullable number

documentation.value: Returns the result of rounding a number to the specified number of digits.
The number to round.
Optional. The number of decimal places. Default is 0.
Optional. RoundingMode.Up, RoundingMode.Down, RoundingMode.AwayFromZero, RoundingMode.ToEven.

signatures.label: Date.From(value as any, optional culture as nullable text) as nullable date

documentation.value: Converts a value to a date. Supports conversion from text, datetime, datetimezone, and number.
The value to convert to a date.
Optional. A text value for culture-specific parsing (e.g., "en-US").

signatures.label: Record.Field(record as record, field as text) as any

documentation.value: Returns the value of the specified field in a record. Equivalent to record[field].
The record to access.
The name of the field to retrieve.

signatures.label: Table.Group(table as table, key as any, aggregatedColumns as list, optional groupKind as GroupKind.Type, optional comparer as function) as table

documentation.value: Groups table rows by key columns and applies aggregate functions to create summary columns.
The input table to group.
The column name or list of column names to group by.
A list of {new column name, aggregation function, optional type} lists.
Optional. GroupKind.Global or GroupKind.Local.
Optional. A comparer function for comparing key values.

signatures.label: Table.Join(table1 as table, key1 as any, table2 as table, key2 as any, optional joinKind as JoinKind.Type, optional joinAlgorithm as JoinAlgorithm.Type, optional keyEqualityComparers as list) as table

documentation.value: Joins two tables based on matching key columns.
The left table.
The join key column name(s) from table1.
The right table.
The join key column name(s) from table2.
Optional. JoinKind.Inner, JoinKind.LeftOuter, JoinKind.RightOuter, JoinKind.FullOuter, JoinKind.LeftAnti, JoinKind.RightAnti.
